## Summary

Describe the user-facing change and why it belongs in this project.

## Verification

List automated checks, simulator versions, and any skipped live integration checks.

## Safety checklist

- [ ] Tests cover new protocol, control, failure, and watchdog behavior where applicable.
- [ ] Loopback, authentication, path-confinement, confirmation, and emergency-stop gates remain intact.
- [ ] No credentials, bridge tokens, personal paths, proprietary assets, model weights, or generated engines are included.
- [ ] Documentation and version compatibility notes are updated where needed.
- [ ] I ran the checks in `docs/DEVELOPMENT.md`.
